entry.title: Public Dashboard — participation metrics and network indicators
entry.summary: Verified citizens, active nodes, governance actions, and current activity summary.

entry.title: Citizenship Tools — readiness self-check and contribution path finder
entry.summary: Readiness checklist, contribution path finder, and preparation guidance.

entry.title: Charter — foundational operating principles
entry.summary: Operating principles and governance framework for the Principality of Aetheria.
